title: 宝塚記念の後に・それはあまりに眩しく

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The battle between Air Groove and Silence
Suzuka is over! Air Groove pulled off an intense
burst of speed in the last moments and edged
Silence Suzuka out for the victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Gasp...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (Did I... really win?)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(I'm seeing afterimages of Suzuka even now! I... I
can't stop shaking!)

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text: You were amazing, Suzuka! Don't sweat it!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: Suzuka! You were so fabulous out there!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(The audience is entranced by Suzuka's
performance... I'm not the only one who can't
shake the image of her from my mind.)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(That's just how beautiful, unbound, and...
dazzling Suzuka is on the track.)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (I understand that more than anyone else.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I lost today. I couldn't keep up with you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I may have won the race, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Inside, in my heart... You floored me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I can't stop shaking. This isn't the thrill of winning.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's... awe. And longing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I... didn't surpass you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I... Sorry. Please excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove may have beaten Silence Suzuka, but
the look on her face suggests inner torment.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You see it too, don't you? I couldn't surpass her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I won the race, but the image of her running is
burned into my mind.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I can't stop shaking even now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's frustration is apparent. I desperately
try to think of something to say...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Please... Don't make that face.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We've still got training tomorrow. Slow and
steady, just as always.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
For the time being, the race we need to aim for is
the Sapporo Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes... that should do, shouldn't it? There's
nothing you need to worry about anymore.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...I'm heading back ahead of you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Groove dashes off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've never seen Air Groove look so upset before...
